channel.title: Daily Knowledge Digest
channel.description: Automated daily notes: Science, Tech, Math, Logic

item.title: March 29, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Homotopy Type Theory, Synthetic Biology, Game Theory, Elliptic Curves

item.title: March 28, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · SAT Solvers, Category Theory in Logic, Modal Logic, Proof Theory

item.title: March 27, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Number Theory, Graph Theory, Differential Equations, Category Theory

item.title: March 26, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Operating System Design, Monte Carlo Methods, Group Theory, Topology

item.title: March 25, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Graph Neural Networks, WebAssembly, Blockchain Technology, Formal Verification

item.title: March 24, 2026
item.description: ~18 min · Higgs Boson, Climate Science, Stem Cell Biology, RISC-V Architecture

item.title: March 23, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Theory of Evolution, Laws of Thermodynamics, Epigenetics, Neuroplasticity

item.title: March 22, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Computability Theory, Computational Complexity, Causal Inference, Dark Matter

item.title: March 21, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Mathematical Optimization, Lambda Calculus, Type Theory, Curry-Howard Correspondence

item.title: March 20, 2026
item.description: ~17 min · Gödel's Incompleteness Theorems, P vs NP Problem, Information Theory, Linear Algebra

item.title: March 19, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · Distributed Systems, LLM Alignment, Bayes' Theorem, Fourier Transform

item.title: March 16, 2026
item.description: ~15 min · Zero-Knowledge Proofs, Homomorphic Encryption, Reinforcement Learning, Quantum Computing

item.title: March 15, 2026
item.description: ~16 min · General Relativity, Quantum Entanglement, Transformer Architecture, Diffusion Models

item.title: March 14, 2026
item.description: ~14 min · Quantum Mechanics, CRISPR-Cas9, Black Holes, Protein Folding
